texto: Worship isn’t just a concept or idea— it is a real encounter at appointed times with the one true God in Christ through the Holy Spirit. If all the ideas about worship today can’t be translated into real plans for dialoguing with God, what good are they?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Constance Cherry que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Worship isn’t just a concept or idea— it is a real encounter at appointed times with the one true…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, christianity, faith, com foco em faith e worship.
